description_long: This is a stout, wooden barrel with a classic, slightly bulging cylindrical shape, reinforced by two thick, dark metal hoops encircling its upper and lower sections. The wood staves are vertically aligned, featuring a rich brown color with visible wood grain and subtle carved lines, giving it a rustic, hand-crafted appearance. The top and bottom surfaces are flat and made of the same wood, tightly fitted within the metal bands. The metal hoops are rugged and matte, suggesting durability and a utilitarian design. There are no visible handles, spigots, or decorative markings, emphasizing its functional nature. This type of barrel is commonly found in urban environments such as alleys, storage areas, or near taverns and markets.
description: A sturdy, wooden barrel with dark metal hoops and a rustic, hand-crafted look. The surface is textured with wood grain and reinforced by thick metal bands.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat wooden top and prominent metal hoops, with clear wood grain detail.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the barrel and the vertical wood staves, with the metal bands clearly visible.
description_view_2: Another side view with visible wood texture and a slightly different wood grain pattern, showing the seamless integration of the metal hoops.
description_view_3: Rear view similar to the other sides, emphasizing the uniformity of the wood staves and the rugged metal reinforcement.
